scripts.dev: bun run scripts/kill-dashboard-processes.ts && concurrently "bun run hmr" "bun run electron:watch" "bun run electron:run"
scripts.web: bun run scripts/kill-dashboard-processes.ts && concurrently "vite --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173" "bun run native:build:host && GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_ROOT=$PWD GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_LAUNCH_CWD=$PWD GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_RPC_HOST=0.0.0.0 bun src/main/web.ts"
scripts.electron:run: bunx wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 .electron/index.js && GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_ROOT=$PWD GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_LAUNCH_CWD=$PWD WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1 ELECTRON_HMR=1 electronmon .
scripts.build:desktop: bun run native:build:host && bunx vite build && bun run electron:build-main
scripts.native:build:ghostty-vt: ROOT=$PWD; ZIG=zig; if [ -x "$ROOT/.tools/zig-x86_64-linux-0.15.2/zig" ]; then ZIG="$ROOT/.tools/zig-x86_64-linux-0.15.2/zig"; fi; cd deps/ghostty && "$ZIG" build lib-vt -Doptimize=ReleaseFast -Demit-macos-app=false -Demit-xcframework=false
scripts.native:build:host: ROOT=$PWD; ZIG=zig; if [ -x "$ROOT/.tools/zig-x86_64-linux-0.15.2/zig" ]; then ZIG="$ROOT/.tools/zig-x86_64-linux-0.15.2/zig"; fi; cd src/native && "$ZIG" build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
scripts.test:avatar:codex:long-song:screenshot: bun run scripts/agent-avatar-screenshot.ts --app=codex --prompt="write a very long song with many verses about terminals, rain, and midnight debugging; keep going for at least 20 lines" --working-wait-ms=45000 --out=screenshots/codex-avatar-long-song-working.png
scripts.test:avatar:codex:bottom-working:screens: bun run scripts/agent-avatar-screenshot.ts --app=codex --prompt="write a very long song with many verses about terminals, rain, and midnight debugging; keep going for at least 60 lines" --window-width=1000 --window-height=560 --working-wait-ms=45000 --post-working-wait-ms=5000 --out=screenshots/codex-avatar-bottom-working.png
